description_long: This is a male adult pedestrian dressed in rugged, utilitarian outdoor clothing, including a long-sleeved buttoned shirt, belted trousers, and sturdy boots. He wears a headband and carries a large, well-equipped backpack with visible straps and pouches, suggesting preparedness for travel or outdoor activity. A crossbody satchel and a belt pouch are also present, adding to the sense of utility and readiness. His stance is upright with arms extended horizontally, and his facial expression is neutral. The clothing appears worn and practical, suitable for extended periods outdoors or in challenging environments. Accessories such as the headband and multiple bags indicate a focus on function and preparedness.
description: A rugged adult male pedestrian in practical outdoor attire, equipped with a backpack, satchel, and headband, ready for travel or urban exploration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the headband, facial features, buttoned shirt, crossbody satchel, and belt pouch clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the headband, the depth of the backpack, and the side of the satchel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full backpack, shoulder straps, and the back of the shirt and trousers.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the headband, backpack, and the side of the belt pouch and satchel.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved buttoned shirt, belted trousers, utility belt, and outdoor jacket with multiple pockets
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
